title: YouTube long-form
text: 16:9 1920x1080; thumbnail 1280x720; title 80 to 100 characters front-load the primary keyword; hook in the first 15 to 30 seconds; CTR good 4 to 10 percent

title: YouTube Shorts
text: 9:16 1080x1920; 15 to 60 seconds performs best; rewards replay rate, swipe-through, and completion

title: Instagram Reels
text: 9:16 1080x1920; caption up to 2200 characters; rewards completion, saves, shares, sends; feed crops to 4:5

title: Instagram carousel
text: up to 20 slides, 4:5 or 3:4; strong for step-by-step tutorials and before and after; drives dwell time and saves

title: TikTok
text: 9:16 1080x1920; optimal 15 to 35 seconds; completion rate dominant; design audio-first

title: Pinterest
text: visual search engine; standard pin 2:3 at 1000x1500; keyword-rich titles, descriptions, board names, alt text; pins compound over months to years
